calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-25-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on TUES-NOV-25-2008: David J. Yang, counsel for plaintiff YiWu Jiang, who is also present; Dennis J. Sinclitico and Jennifer M. Field, counsel by limited scope representation for defendant Anthony Carillo, who is also present

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 564 Chenery Street, San Francisco, CA 94131. The DEC-01-2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Norman Nayfach, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
